====Pokémon====
=====Controlled=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Archie
|pkmn=Kyogre

|epnum=AG097
|epname=Gaining Groudon
|main=Kyogre and Groudon (Ruby and Sapphire series)
|main_section=Kyogre
|desc={{p|Kyogre}} was first seen in the containment chamber of Team Magma's ship. Aqua Admin [[Shelly]] set it free by increasing the humidity levels in the chamber so it could revive itself. It was seen with Team Aqua afterwards. In its next appearance, Kyogre fought Groudon and was able to knock it out, thus causing the orbs in Archie and Pikachu to separate. Kyogre was able to rescue Ash and Pikachu after the battle was done. In the end, it returned to its hidden location at the bottom of the sea.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Archie
|pkmn=Groudon

|main_section=Groudon
|desc={{p|Groudon}} was first seen being trapped inside Team Aqua's submarine, from which it was released by Ash's Pikachu. It went into battle with Kyogre. After a long fight, Groudon was able to defeat its opponent. At the end of the episode, Groudon returned to the volcano it originally came from.}}
